programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou show diesel sedans pack power. Lou mods a vintage Mercedes 300D, while Jared upgrades a BMW 335D with new turbos and an ECU tune.

programme.title: Airplane Repo

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: Ian begins assembly of a custom LJ chassis and builds a full Jeep out of a pile of metal. He adds front and rear axles with control arms, and finishes off the suspension.

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: Ian starts work on a custom All-Aluminum Land Rover Defender that sits on top of a Jeep JK chassis. The Cummins R2.8 engine will be the cherry on top.

programme.title: Kindig Customs

programme.desc: Prayer is a great blessing from God, and as we bring our requests before God, we will see Him at work in answering them.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: You were made to echo heaven's sound-let your life align with His heartbeat and glory.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Pride blocks God's blessings, but humility opens the doors! Today, Joyce reveals the dangers of pride and the rewards of living a humble life.

programme.title: Paul's Promise
programme.desc: The inspiring true story of Paul Holderfield, a bigoted firefighter-turned pastor, who started one of the first integrated churches in the American South.

programme.title: The Science-Fiction Makers
programme.desc: Feature documentary that examines three integral writers who over the past century wrote within the Christian Science Fiction genre.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2

programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: The Munsters

programme.title: The Smurfs 2

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Flint thought he saved the world when he destroyed his infamous invention but he soon learns that the machine survived and has created 'foodimals'! Now he is on a mission to save the world - again!

programme.title: Madagascar

programme.title: Dyson Home Solutions
programme.desc: Pioneering new ways to keep your home clean. Dyson vacuums feature innovative technologies to deliver powerful suction and filtration to trap fine dust. Only a Dyson works like a Dyson.

programme.title: Manchester TBC
programme.desc: Refresh your home with this stunning Manchester collection. Stylish home essentials. Discover quality comfort and timeless designs to elevate your space effortlessly.

programme.title: The Science-Fiction Makers
programme.desc: Feature documentary that examines three integral writers who over the past century wrote within the Christian Science Fiction genre.

programme.title: Junebug
programme.desc: When an 8-year-old version of herself starts appearing to her, Juniper begins to realise that life is not what she had hoped it would be. Young Junebug pushes Juniper to start writing again.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Uncovering the Enemy's Tactics Against You
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of grace. He helps believers understand how greatly blessed and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Experiencing failure of some kind is an unavoidable part of business. Expecting it to come your way at some point - big or small - is an important part of building business success.

programme.title: I Still Believe
programme.desc: One love can change your life. One life can change the world. Rediscover the wonder of love in I STILL BELIEVE, based on the real-life story of chart-topping singer Jeremy Camp.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In his message Bread from Heaven, Pastor Harrison Conley unpacks John 6 where Jesus miraculously feeds the 5,000 and walks on water.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you ever struggle with patience? Today, Joyce shares how patience, a fruit of the Spirit, can help you enjoy peace and contentment, even when life isn't going as planned.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: The heart of the weekly teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.title: Bible Man

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth develops a new method of teaching. Nathan goes undercover. A familiar face returns to Hope Valley with an unlucky heiress in tow. Lucas and Lee face their differences.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.sub-title: The Lights are On, But Nobody's Home
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe and is a blend of flying, construction and renovations, fishing, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Should You Treat Your Enemies? - Part 1
programme.desc: Are you mad at somebody right now? Joyce discusses the life-changing power of forgiveness and moving on from past hurts, as we explore the importance of treating others right, no matter what.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: I Still Believe
programme.desc: One love can change your life. One life can change the world. Rediscover the wonder of love in I STILL BELIEVE, based on the real-life story of chart-topping singer Jeremy Camp.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find the mythological beast, the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A lost penguin rescued from an oil spill transforms the life of a heartbroken fisherman. They soon become unlikely friends, so bonded that even the vast ocean cannot divide them.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: When a Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home, he finds himself lost and alone at Paddington Station. This charming family comedy is based on the classic children's books.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: Santa's brother Fred, who has lost belief in Christmas, discovers that a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour

programme.title: Kids Beach Club

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: Corrie ten Boom and her family look after innocent Jewish families and hide them from the Nazis. See their amazing story of courage, sacrifice and forgiveness.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from. Hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Forgiven To Forgive, Blessed To Bless Part 2
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Sacred Sites of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: Event planner Hazel must organise the perfect wedding for her sister in less than a month when she finds out the venue is being sold. To deliver on her sister's dream, Hazel meets with a man preparing the historic estate for sale.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: Concerns arise as Tre and Leticia take the next steps forward. Agent Long and Agent Boyer contact Gary Travis for information on CMI.

programme.title: Smoketown
programme.desc: In the wake of a mysterious and shocking murder, three unique people - an Assistant Chief of Police, a reporter, and a teenage girl - are empowered to fight for the city's poorest neighbourhood.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Exodus: Set Free to Follow God Pt4
programme.desc: God rescues people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people but to bring them into a life-giving relationship that is part of His plan.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Transformative Power Of God_s Word Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of grace. He helps believers understand how greatly blessed and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.sub-title: The Lord Will Lighten Your Load
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Should You Treat Your Enemies? - Part 1
programme.desc: Are you mad at somebody right now? Joyce discusses the life-changing power of forgiveness and moving on from past hurts, as we explore the importance of treating others right, no matter what.

programme.title: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: Small-town baker, Kelly, gets a big surprise when she is invited to compete on a Valentine's Day baking show in New York City - and an even bigger surprise when she runs into her ex-fiance.

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.title: Life on the Island of Jesus

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Transformative Power Of God_s Word Pt 1 of 4

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have a few questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In his message Bread from Heaven, Pastor Harrison Conley unpacks John 6 where Jesus miraculously feeds the 5,000 and walks on water.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: You were made to echo heaven's sound-let your life align with His heartbeat and glory.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Should You Treat Your Enemies? - Part 2
programme.desc: How hard is it to pray for your enemies? Today, learn about spiritual warfare as you discover the liberating power of being a blessing to those who have hurt you.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Are You Walking With God?/A Helper for All Occasions
programme.desc: Dr Stanley tackles important life issues like parenting, finances, and relationships, fervently believing the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: The Vows We Keep

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit's feud with Mr McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next-door.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: Event planner Hazel must organise the perfect wedding for her sister in less than a month when she finds out the venue is being sold. To deliver on her sister's dream, Hazel meets with a man preparing the historic estate for sale.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: Holy Moly turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions to help children immediately relate to the stories.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.sub-title: The Lord Will Lighten Your Load
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Travel with Jeni & Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Sample some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with a host of extraordinary women about identity, purpose, relationships and much more.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: The Preacher to the Popes
programme.desc: With a career spanning over 19 years, Leon Stensholm has won 21 first place titles in the sport of natural body building.

programme.title: The True Summit
programme.desc: This Award-Winning documentary follows 14 men and mountaineer Kevin DeVries on a trek to Everest Base Camp as he prepares to climb in the region after a cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: The Coles Story: From Corner Store to Supermarket Giant
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Transformative Power Of God_s Word Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of grace. He helps believers understand how greatly blessed and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Is Buddhism compatible with Christianity? The short answer is no.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Should You Treat Your Enemies? - Part 2
programme.desc: How hard is it to pray for your enemies? Today, learn about spiritual warfare as you discover the liberating power of being a blessing to those who have hurt you.

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: Cara decides to go on a dating detox. Challenged by her employer to write about it, she books a spontaneous ski getaway with her best friend.

programme.title: My Son, My Saviour
programme.desc: A powerful portrayal of the life of Jesus as seen through the eyes of his mother, Mary. Using the Gospel as its framework, we see how Mary responded to the events of Jesus' life.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Are You Walking With God?/A Helper for All Occasions
programme.desc: Dr Stanley tackles important life issues like parenting, finances, and relationships, fervently believing the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic misses all of the signs of true love when she puts her trust in a bouquet tossed at a wedding.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Transformative Power Of God_s Word Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: In this inspiring message, Pastor Bev Mortlock teaches how God cares so much for us that when you turn to Him you can overcome the challenges of life.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Holding positions of leadership and influence are easy when things are going well. But true leadership shines in the moments that are most difficult.

programme.title: Towards Belief
programme.desc: Australian pastor and host, Karl Faase travels to the UK, USA and Australia to interview more than thirty leading authors, speakers and apologists as they seek to defuse the top belief blockers to the Christian faith.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Allie & Kels try a myriad of extravagant and eclectic dishes all around the city.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing faith through music.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Jesus gave His disciples, and us, the Lord's Prayer to show us how we should pray and what pattern we should follow for prayer.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you dealing with any "uninvited guests" that have taken over your mind? Today, Joyce shares how to cast out those negative "guests," as well as how to reclaim your peace, joy, and purpose.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Despite being the most influential figure in history, Jesus did not follow conventional patterns of leadership. His call for His followers to serve one another with humility is one of the most powerful ideas from His teaching.

programme.title: Everyone: Amsterdam 23
programme.desc: This 3 day conference held in the Netherlands in 2023 was packed with many great speakers around the world. All with one heart and mission to reach EVERYONE worldwide with Christ.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A piglet won by a farmer in a raffle is raised by a sheepdog as one of her own and becomes a champion sheep-herder.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Harold can bring anything in his book to life by drawing it. When he grows up and steps out of the book and into the real world, he realises he has much to learn.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into mouse burgers!

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Finding out that her favoured method of birth control is only available in a limited supply, Elaine must decide if her boyfriend is worthy.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer is active in the reopening of an old movie theatre. He also is keeping an eye on a friend who's recovering from a nervous breakdown. Lloyd has a pack of Chinese gum, that Kramer insists everyone tries.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine is dating a saxophonist who is "sponge-worthy" but doesn't really like to "do everything". Jerry tells one of the members of the band that Elaine and the saxophonist are dating.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer befriends a caddy, who helps him improve his golf game. George's bosses consider him for a promotion when they think he is so dedicated that he starts work earlier and stays later than everyone else.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Elaine strains her neck trying to get a bike she wants, she offers the bike as a gift to whoever can fix her neck. Meanwhile, Susan's cousin gives her baby the name George planned to give his first child.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry surprises his parents by buying them a new car. George reconsiders his engagement when a friend of Elaine tells him that she could have set him up with actress Marisa Tomei.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's obsession with Marisa makes Susan suspicious. Elaine calls Jerry in Florida and tells him she wants to come and join him. Elaine obtains Marisa's phone number for George, who needs her for an alibi.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine gets a physical for a pending trip with to Africa, but when her test results show traces of opium, Peterman fires her. Jerry's parents are in New York biding time until they can move back to Florida.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Susan's old roommate from college gives Jerry a package that she wants him to be careful with, but he loses his own package in the process. Frank tells George he is turning his room into a billiard room.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is happy because his wedding is delayed three months and excited because Jerry is going to go out with Susan's best friend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Jerry uses Elaine to prove that a sales clerk is wrong about his looking at an expensive jacket, Elaine is picked up by the clerk. George has an unwanted house guest, a wig master on a broadway musical.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George becomes Steinbrenner's pet when he shares a calzone with him. Kramer is raving about wearing clothes straight out of the dryer. Jerry thinks that Elaine's boyfriend is dating her without really asking her out.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George doesn't hear the details on a project that Wilhelm wants him to champion. Peterman wants Elaine to bid on some golf clubs at an auction and gets into a bidding war.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Wilhelm is delighted with the job George did on the project. The detective on the case thinks he's found Jerry's car, damaged beyond recognition.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After George makes an off-hand remark to a married couple with a rocky relationship, Jerry and Elaine wait for their inevitable separation. Elaine sports a new hairdo and starts driving again, making Jerry carsick.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George picks up a bad habit from some baseball officials. Elaine has a runner as a house guest during the New York City Marathon, while Kramer gets a jacuzzi.

programme.desc: George and Elaine discuss how annoyed they are by Jerry's sweet-talking to his girlfriend. Then Elaine makes an ordering error in front of the Soup Nazi, gets on his bad side and is banned from his stall for a year.

programme.desc: George tries to keep his ATM code a secret from Susan. Elaine is puzzled by a man she once met at a party and talked to for 10 minutes, who doesn't remember her, but does remember other party details.

programme.desc: Justin and Anna pick a classic Westwood Coronado for very enthusiastic clients, but they have several issues with the interior renovation.

programme.title: Epic Drives

programme.desc: Arthur St. Antoine takes a feisty FJ Cruiser into the desert of the American Southwest, encountering huge dunes and missile-testing ranges.

programme.title: Epic Drives
programme.desc: Host Arthur St. Antoine takes a rally route from Tacoma, WA, to Pebble Beach, CA, in a legendary 1960s muscle-sports machine: the 427 Cobra.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Road to Ridler follows Dave Kindig as he enters the prestigious Ridler competition for the first time, showcasing his design talent.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: Chief decides to get a new car while the battle for top list spots gets cutthroat.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.desc: Brad bites the Pastrami Zombie sandwich in Portland, a Filipino sweet bread sandwich in St. Louis, and BlueberryLemon Cobbler in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries poke and island specialties in Hawaii and homemade pasta in California. A Latin joint serves up tasty Colombian specialities.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud
programme.desc: The crew pushes to finish the Ferrari F40 and get it sold. Costs rise when the $8000 windshield gets broken.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have a few questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: You were made to echo heaven's sound-let your life align with His heartbeat and glory.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Post Natal Depression affects 1 in 5 mothers in Australia. The Be That team discuss the journey through PND and how to best support those who are navigating their way to recovery.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth develops a new method of teaching. Nathan goes undercover. A familiar face returns to Hope Valley with an unlucky heiress in tow. Lucas and Lee face their differences.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: The ladies head to Gippsland to meet a tough but glamorous diary farmer & discuss the mental health of the Gippsland farming and dairy industry.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John and Abe's relationship reaches a tipping point, so John starts looking for a new job and a place to live.

programme.title: Walking in the Footsteps of Faith
programme.desc: Discover how giants of the faith like Mother Theresa, Martin Luther, and David Livingston lived following Steve walking in their footsteps!

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Transformative Power Of God_s Word Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Are You Walking With God?/A Helper for All Occasions
programme.desc: Dr Stanley tackles important life issues like parenting, finances, and relationships, fervently believing the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you dealing with any "uninvited guests" that have taken over your mind? Today, Joyce shares how to cast out those negative "guests," as well as how to reclaim your peace, joy, and purpose.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth develops a new method of teaching. Nathan goes undercover. A familiar face returns to Hope Valley with an unlucky heiress in tow. Lucas and Lee face their differences.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: The ladies head to Gippsland to meet a tough but glamorous diary farmer & discuss the mental health of the Gippsland farming and dairy industry.

programme.title: Redeemed Forever Free
programme.desc: A documentary which tells the stories of five men, five very ordinary men, who have experienced a powerful life transformation. 5 broken men who have moved from a place of hopelessness to a place and life of purpose.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: The Power of Jesus in Galilee
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: In this inspiring message, Pastor Bev Mortlock teaches how God cares so much for us that when you turn to Him you can overcome the challenges of life.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In his message Bread from Heaven, Pastor Harrison Conley unpacks John 6 where Jesus miraculously feeds the 5,000 and walks on water.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Forgiven To Forgive, Blessed To Bless Part 2
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Transformative Power Of God_s Word Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.sub-title: The End of Silliness? More Really Silly Songs!
programme.desc: Archibald Asparagus has cancelled 'Silly Songs with Larry'! A despondent Larry the Cucumber drowns his sorrows at Jimmy Gourd's ice cream parlor. Will Archibald give Larry his job back?

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Exodus: Set Free to Follow God Pt4
programme.desc: God's rescue of His people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people, but to bring them into a relationship that is part of His plan.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe and is a blend of flying and renovations, camp life, fishing, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Travel with Jeni & Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Sample some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with a host of extraordinary women about identity, purpose, relationships and much more.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Overcoming the effects of trauma and PTSD is possible through treatment which focuses on processing the trauma into memories and restoring a sense of safety both cognitively and emotionally. With guest Ruth Whitford.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.sub-title: The Lord Will Lighten Your Load
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What are you allowing to live in your mind rent-free? Today, Joyce teaches how to kick fear, anger, and jealousy to the curb-and start living the peaceful, powerful life God intended for you.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.sub-title: The Lights are On, But Nobody's Home
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth develops a new method of teaching. Nathan goes undercover. A familiar face returns to Hope Valley with an unlucky heiress in tow. Lucas and Lee face their differences.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Richard the Stork and the Mystery of ...
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A local scientist is often regarded as a failure until he invents a machine that can make food fall from the sky. But little does he know, things are about to take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Flint thought he saved the world when he destroyed his infamous invention but he soon learns that the machine survived and has created 'foodimals'! Now he is on a mission to save the world - again!

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil look back at two unfinished projects impacting both property values and family life. One family started their home renovation two decades ago and never completed it, while the others stopped.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: To Extend Or Not To Extend
programme.desc: We tackle the most common renovation conundrum, to extend or not to extend, with two families desperate for more space, but unsure how and more importantly where to add it.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: This time, it's all about support networks and family ties, with two sets of couples unable to decide whether to stay close to their roots or up sticks to pastures new.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: We look at collections and clutter with two very full houses. One couple is reluctant to part with their precious belongings, the other is in desperate need of a clear out.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: A tale of two growing families: one have outstayed their welcome in their current home while a lack of usable space means the other can't even imagine starting a family in their own.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: Is It Over For Open Plan?
programme.desc: This time, it's all about simple layout and snug, smaller spaces. One couple struggle with a number of redundant rooms, while another is undecided in a house with a lot of unused space.

programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil look back at two families who were pushed to their limits by life-changing builds. When the dust had settled, both projects proved to be sound investments in more ways than one.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Kelly was thrilled to find a family cottage on the Muskoka lake, but her husband Michael is second-guessing their impulse purchase. Will designer Dan convince them to stay or will Elisa find a better cottage?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Now that they have kids, Kelly and Brent are divided over the cottage they once loved. Can realtor Elisa find a cottage to lure Brent away, or will designer Dan make Kelly fall back in love with their vacation home?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: The constant work needed to fix up Andy and Sandra's dream cottage has them divided. Can designer Dan show Sandra her cottage's potential? Or will Elisa find the perfect vacation spot?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Joanne and Dave bought their one-bedroom cottage while they were dating, but have now outgrown it as a family of four. Can designer Dan give them more space or will Elisa find them a move-in-ready cottage?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: After welcoming a new baby, Jackie can't live with the renovations of the ski chalet that she and Brandi purchased. Can Dan make their chalet the headache-free vacation home? Or will realtor Elisa lure them away?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Katherine regrets purchasing an ageing lakeside villa, while Greg sees its potential to be an escape. Can designer Dan end Katherine's buyer's remorse, or will realtor Elisa show Greg the perfect vacation home?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Two years after buying their fixer-upper farm in Prince Edward County, Alison wants out while Jeremy does not. Can realtor Elisa coax Jeremy to trade in his pet project, or will Dan convince Alison to stay?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Karen wants to leave her cramped cottage, but her husband Mark is tied to the memories. Can designer Dan make enough impact for Karen to consider a future here, or will realtor Elisa find another vacation cottage?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Jenny knows the cottage will never be big enough, but Lorne believes an expansion could make Jenny want to stay. Can designer Dan create enough space? Or will realtor Elisa find a bigger vacation home?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Lauren and Jim took a gamble buying their Hornby Island vacation cabin sight unseen. Can designer Dan fix Jim's decade-long DIY disaster? Or will realtor Elisa have them rolling the dice on a new vacation home?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Sisters Margaret and Barbara's cottage has been in their family for over 80 years. Can designer Dan breathe life into this dilapidated shack?

programme.title: Love It or List It Vacation Homes
programme.desc: Pete adores the cramped A-frame Whistler vacation home he calls 'Pete's Place'. But Jude wants a cabin that works for them both. Can Dan salvage this rat's nest, or will Elisa lure them away with the perfect chalet?
